Package dev.morphia.critter.parser.generator

Class GenerationUtils

java.lang.Object
dev.morphia.critter.parser.generator.GenerationUtils
public class GenerationUtils extends Object
Static utility methods bridging annotation introspection and Morphia type data with the ClassFile API.

    Resolves a ClassDesc to a Class using the given class loader.

  • Field Details

    • PRIMITIVE_TO_WRAPPER

      public static final Map<String,String> PRIMITIVE_TO_WRAPPER

  • Method Details

    • findSetterMethod

      public static Method findSetterMethod(Class<?> start, String name, ClassDesc paramDesc)
      Walks the class hierarchy looking for a non-private, non-static method named name with a single parameter matching paramDesc. Returns the first such method found, or null if none exists (including when the parameter type cannot be resolved).

    • typeClassName

      public static String typeClassName(ClassDesc cd)
      Converts a ClassDesc to a type class name string suitable for Class.forName().

    • emitBooleanMethod

      public static void emitBooleanMethod(io.github.dmlloyd.classfile.ClassBuilder cb, String name, boolean value)
      Emits a no-arg boolean method that returns a constant value.

    • safeClassLoader

      public static ClassLoader safeClassLoader(Class<?> type)
      Returns the classloader for the given type, falling back to the system classloader for bootstrap-loaded types.

    • readClassModel

      public static io.github.dmlloyd.classfile.ClassModel readClassModel(Class<?> type)
      Reads and parses the class file for the given type. Returns null if the class file resource cannot be found; throws RuntimeException on I/O or parse failure.

    • toClassfileAnnotation

      public static io.github.dmlloyd.classfile.Annotation toClassfileAnnotation(Annotation ann)
      Converts a runtime annotation instance into a ClassFile API annotation descriptor, suitable for use in RuntimeVisibleAnnotationsAttribute. All element values are captured at generation time.

    • emitAnnotationViaBuilder

      public static void emitAnnotationViaBuilder(io.github.dmlloyd.classfile.CodeBuilder cod, Annotation ann)
      Emits bytecode that calls the generated AnnotationBuilder for a Morphia annotation, leaving the built annotation instance on the operand stack. Values are hardcoded as bytecode constants — no runtime reflection.

      Assumes the annotation type lives under dev.morphia.annotations and that its builder follows the XxxBuilder.xxxBuilder()...build() convention.

    • emitClassRef

      public static void emitClassRef(io.github.dmlloyd.classfile.CodeBuilder cod, Class<?> cls)
      Emits bytecode that loads a Class reference. Non-public classes use Class.forName().

    • emitTypeData

      public static void emitTypeData(dev.morphia.mapping.codec.pojo.TypeData<?> data, io.github.dmlloyd.classfile.CodeBuilder cod)
      Emits bytecode that constructs a TypeData instance.

    • primitiveUnboxMethod

      public static String primitiveUnboxMethod(String primitiveTypeName)
      Returns the unboxing method name for the given primitive type name (e.g. "int" → "intValue").

    • primitiveClassDesc

      public static ClassDesc primitiveClassDesc(String primitiveTypeName)
      Returns the ClassDesc for a primitive type name (e.g. "int" → ConstantDescs.CD_int).

    • asClass

      public static Class<?> asClass(ClassDesc cd, ClassLoader classLoader)
      Resolves a ClassDesc to a Class using the given class loader.
